name: ntfy-blade-mcp
title: ntfy
description: ntfy push notification MCP — publish, poll, topic reservation, and token management. Double-gate security with PII scrubbing.
author: groupthink-dev

env.name: NTFY_BASE_URL
env.description: ntfy server URL (e.g. https://ntfy.sh or self-hosted)

env.name: NTFY_TOKEN
env.description: Bearer token (tk_...). Optional for public topics

env.name: NTFY_DEFAULT_TOPIC
env.description: Default topic when none specified in publish

env.name: NTFY_WRITE_ENABLED
env.description: Enable write operations (publish, cancel, reserve, tokens)

setup.help_text: Create an access token in your ntfy server → Account → Access tokens. For self-hosted servers, use the admin credentials.
setup.blurb: Push notifications via ntfy — publish with priority, tags, markdown, actions, and scheduled delivery. Double-gate security: env gate + per-call confirmation.
